# Corporate Structure Memorandum

**To:** Board of Directors, Cedarbrook Group Inc.
**From:** Corporate Counsel
**Date:** February 20, 2026
**Re:** Post-Acquisition Corporate Structure of Cedarbrook Group

## Overview

This memorandum describes the corporate structure of Cedarbrook Group Inc. ("Cedarbrook")
and its subsidiaries following the completion of the acquisition of Lakeview Distribution Corp.
on January 31, 2026.

## Ownership Structure

Cedarbrook Group Inc. owns 100% of Lakeview Distribution Corp., a corporation incorporated
under the laws of Manitoba.

Cedarbrook Group Inc. owns 100% of Pinoak Financial Services Inc., a corporation incorporated
under the laws of Ontario.

Cedarbrook Group Inc. owns 75% of Ridgetop Realty Ltd., a corporation incorporated under
the laws of British Columbia. The remaining 25% is held by Westcoast Properties Corp.,
an arm's length third party.

Pinoak Financial Services Inc. owns 60% of Bridgewater Asset Management Inc., a corporation
incorporated under the laws of Ontario. The remaining 40% is held by Weststone Capital
Partners Ltd., a limited partnership.

Lakeview Distribution Corp. owns 100% of Lakeview Transport No. 1 Inc. and 100% of Lakeview
Transport No. 2 Inc., both corporations incorporated under the laws of Manitoba.

## Entities

The following entities form part of the Cedarbrook corporate group:

- **Cedarbrook Group Inc.**: Ultimate parent; incorporated in Ontario; publicly traded on the
  Toronto Stock Exchange.
- **Lakeview Distribution Corp.**: Wholly owned subsidiary; distribution and logistics
  operations in Manitoba and Saskatchewan.
- **Pinoak Financial Services Inc.**: Wholly owned subsidiary; financial services holding
  company in Ontario.
- **Ridgetop Realty Ltd.**: Majority-owned subsidiary (75%); real estate investment and
  management in British Columbia.
- **Bridgewater Asset Management Inc.**: Subsidiary of Pinoak Financial Services Inc. (60%);
  provides investment management services in Ontario.
- **Lakeview Transport No. 1 Inc.**: Wholly owned subsidiary of Lakeview Distribution Corp.;
  operates fleet of commercial vehicles in Manitoba.
- **Lakeview Transport No. 2 Inc.**: Wholly owned subsidiary of Lakeview Distribution Corp.;
  operates fleet of commercial vehicles in Saskatchewan.

## Key Relationships

Cedarbrook Group Inc. is the ultimate controlling entity of all entities in the group. The
board of directors of Cedarbrook Group Inc. exercises control over each subsidiary through its
authority to appoint and remove directors.

Pinoak Financial Services Inc. acts as the financial services holding entity within the group
and holds the regulated licences required for the investment management activities of
Bridgewater Asset Management Inc.

Lakeview Distribution Corp. coordinates the logistics and transport operations carried out by
Lakeview Transport No. 1 Inc. and Lakeview Transport No. 2 Inc. through intercompany
services agreements.

Ridgetop Realty Ltd. is a joint venture vehicle between Cedarbrook Group Inc. and Westcoast
Properties Corp. pursuant to a shareholders agreement dated January 15, 2024.

Weststone Capital Partners Ltd. holds its 40% interest in Bridgewater Asset Management Inc.
pursuant to a unanimous shareholders agreement dated March 15, 2023.

## Governance Notes

All directors of Cedarbrook Group Inc. subsidiaries are appointed by the parent's board of
directors. The Chief Executive Officer and Chief Financial Officer of Cedarbrook Group Inc.
serve on the boards of all direct wholly-owned subsidiaries.

Ridgetop Realty Ltd. and Bridgewater Asset Management Inc. each have shareholder agreements
that require unanimous consent for material decisions including sale of assets exceeding
$5,000,000, incurring indebtedness exceeding $2,000,000, and any change in business mandate.
